# Instilligent Limited

> AI consultancy and product studio building intelligent solutions for regulated industries across New Zealand, Australia, and Southeast Asia.

## About

Instilligent is a New Zealand-based software company founded in 2019 by Marc Armstrong. We combine deep AI expertise with hands-on consulting to help organisations in regulated industries move faster, stay compliant, and build smarter. With over 15 years of experience in software delivery, systems integration, and technology strategy, we operate across New Zealand, Australia, and Southeast Asia.

We build production-grade AI software that solves real business problems, and we provide specialist consulting and contracting to help organisations adopt AI effectively.

## Products

- [Modular Compliance](https://modularcompliance.com) — In development. Tooling that links New Zealand legislation to the controls and tasks inside a business. Public marketing copy was withdrawn 2026-04-30 because some claims overstated current capability.
- [BossBoard](https://bossboard.instilligent.com) — Mobile-first compliance and business management app for NZ tradespeople. AI-powered SWMS generation, invoicing, quotes, job logging, team management, and photo documentation. From NZD 4.99/week.
- [Mastering MOSS](https://mastering-moss-production.up.railway.app) — Maritime Operator Safety System (MOSS) for NZ commercial maritime operators. Digital MTOP/MTOC document builder, vessel + crew registry, compliance checklists, maintenance and safety equipment tracking. From NZD 29/month.
- [Instilligent Courses](https://courses.instilligent.com) — AI practice exams and structured courses for NZ professionals.
- [CodeHumanist](https://codehumanist.com) — Read-only codebase comprehension platform for human stakeholders. Understand AI-generated codebases — architecture, data flows, use cases — without touching code. Currently waitlist.
- [ProofOnce](https://proofonce.com) — Document and identity verification platform. Verify once, reuse across consumers. Pre-launch.

## Services

- AI Consulting and Advisory — strategy, architecture, and implementation guidance for AI adoption
- Specialist Contracting — hands-on software development and AI engineering
- Technology Strategy — modernisation roadmaps and architecture reviews
- Systems Integration — connecting platforms, APIs, and data across your organisation
- Compliance Automation — automating regulatory compliance workflows with AI

## Technology

We build with Anthropic Claude, MCP Protocol, Claude Code, Python, React, Next.js, Docker, Cloudflare, and Railway.
